# Trace

> Distributed trace record grouping related spans

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| traceId | string | yes | - | Unique trace identifier (W3C trace ID format) |
| rootSpanId | string | yes | - | ID of the root span |
| serviceName | string | yes | - | Originating service name |
| operationName | string | yes | - | Top-level operation name |
| durationMs | integer | yes | - | Total trace duration in milliseconds |
| spanCount | integer | yes | 0 | Number of spans in this trace |
| totalCostUsd | float | yes | 0 | Sum of all LLM call costs within this trace |
| status | ok \| error \| timeout | yes | ok | Trace outcome status |
| metadata | json | yes | - | Additional trace attributes |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## Relations

- hasMany **Span** (via `traceId`)

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/trace` — List all
- `POST /api/trace` — Create
- `GET /api/trace/:id` — Get by ID
- `PUT /api/trace/:id` — Update
- `DELETE /api/trace/:id` — Delete
